note: Tour provides a `tour` config entity, a `tour_tip` plugin type, two permissions, a settings object, and is the contrib successor to core Tour. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded), probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want guided, step-by-step tooltip tours of admin pages. Core no longer ships Tour — which contrib module provides this, and what config object is each tour stored as?
evals.expected_output: The contrib Tour module (drupal/tour), the maintained successor to deprecated core Tour, provides guided tooltip tours; each tour is a `tour` config entity (tour.tour.<id>).

evals.prompt: What are the main parts of a Drupal `tour` config entity that determine where a tour appears and what steps it shows?
evals.expected_output: A tour has an id/label, a `routes` list (route_name + optional route_params) controlling which pages it shows on, and an ordered `tips` list; each tip has a plugin, label, weight, position, and a DOM/CSS selector to attach to.

evals.prompt: How do I make a Tour appear on all article node add forms in Drupal? Where is that targeting defined?
evals.expected_output: In the tour config entity's `routes` list, add an entry with route_name entity.node.add_form (and optionally route_params like node_type: article) — tours match on route name plus optional route parameters.

evals.prompt: I want to add a custom tour step type (beyond plain text) in Drupal Tour. What plugin type do I implement, which attribute/namespace, and which base class?
evals.expected_output: Implement a tour tip plugin: class in Plugin/tour/tip with the #[Tip] attribute, extending Drupal\tour\TipPluginBase; managed by plugin.manager.tour.tip. The bundled plugin id is `text`.

evals.prompt: Which permission lets a user actually see and run tours on a Drupal site, versus administering/creating them?
evals.expected_output: 'access tour' lets a user see/run tours (toolbar button, recap page); 'administer tour' gates the admin UI for creating/editing tours and the settings form.

evals.prompt: How does an end user start a tour in Drupal, and how can I place a launch button outside the toolbar?
evals.expected_output: A Tour button appears in the toolbar on matching routes (or via the Navigation top-bar item); it can also be triggered with the ?tour URL parameter or the alt+t hotkey. Place the `tour_button_block` block for a button elsewhere.

evals.prompt: In a custom Drupal module I want to change the body text of an existing tour's tips before they render. Which hook do I implement?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_tour_tips_alter(array &$tour_tips, EntityInterface $entity) and call $tour_tip->set('body', ...). (Related: hook_tour_tips_info_alter for definitions, hook_tour_build_alter for the render array.)

evals.prompt: Which submodule of Drupal Tour makes tours open automatically for users who haven't seen them yet?
evals.expected_output: The tourauto submodule auto-opens tours for users who have not yet seen them, and adds a per-user preference to enable/disable auto-opening.
